commit_message:
Feat/exec stage Feat/exec stage ## 🚀 Implement Execution Stage with Parameterizable Components

### Summary

This PR introduces the Execute Stage for the pipelined processor, completing the third stage of the 5-stage pipeline architecture. The execution stage handles all arithmetic/logic operations, branch decisions, flag management, and I/O port operations. Additionally, this PR refactors the codebase to make all core components parameterizable using VHDL generics, improving code reusabilit

examples.patch:
@@ -52,6 +52,9 @@ ARCHITECTURE fetch_stage_arch OF fetch_stage IS
     END COMPONENT;
     
     COMPONENT Add_Sub IS
+    GENERIC (
+        WIDTH : NATURAL := 32
+    );
         PORT (
             data_in   : IN  STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(WIDTH-1 DOWNTO 0);
             op_sel    : IN  STD_LOGIC_VECTOR(1 DOWNTO 0);
@@ -102,6 +105,7 @@ BEGIN
     
     -- Add_Sub Unit: Increment PC by 1
     pc_incrementer: Add_Sub
+        GENERIC MAP (WIDTH => WIDTH)
         PORT MAP (
             data_in  => pc_current,
             op_sel   => "01",                     -- Increment operation
